creator: tj+freebsd_ports@a13.fr
text:
Created attachment 229114
update to 3.2.30

  I updated the patch. Both errors are about removed gemspec patches
in ports.

devel/rubygem-gitlab-labkit:
  updated from 0.21.1 to 0.21.2, gemspec patch removed
net/rubygem-activestorage613:
  port removed, looks like it was for gitlab, which now use 6.1.4
  instead of 6.1.3

  So both errors can be ignored or new attached patch can be used.
